common.invoiceLanguageHint: Language used for generated invoice documents (separate from app language).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your invoices and activity.

invoice.title: Invoices
invoice.subtitle: Create, manage and track your invoices.
invoice.smallBusiness: No VAT shown pursuant to §19 UStG (small business regulation)

invoice.invoicesCount: {count, plural, one {# invoice found} other {# invoices found}}
invoice.paginationSummary: Page {page} of {totalPages} · {totalCount, plural, one {# invoice} other {# invoices}}
invoice.emptyListHint: Create your first invoice and automatically generate Google Docs and PDF.
invoice.serviceDescriptionHint: Describe the service provided for this invoice.
invoice.newInvoiceSubtitle: Create a professional invoice in a few steps.
invoice.servicePeriodHint: Saved automatically as a German date range, e.g. 01.01.2026 - 31.01.2026
invoice.invoiceNumberAutoHint: Invoice number is assigned automatically and increments sequentially.
invoice.generationSuccessAlert: Invoice created successfully. All steps completed.
invoice.whatNext: What would you like to do next?
invoice.whatNextHint: Return to invoice list or create another invoice.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage customer master data and prepare invoices.
customers.newCustomerSubtitle: Create a new customer for your invoices.
customers.previewSubtitle: How this customer appears in your list.
customers.searchExtendedPlaceholder: Search by name, company or email
customers.customersCount: {count, plural, one {# customer found} other {# customers found}}
customers.emptyDescription: Create your first customer to generate invoices faster.
customers.noMatchesHint: Adjust search or filters to find customers.
customers.internalNotesSubtitle: Internal information, not shown on invoices

settings.title: Profile
settings.subtitle: Your company, sender details, bank accounts and defaults for new invoices.
settings.senderSubtitle: This information appears on your invoices.
settings.name: Name
settings.addressSubtitle: Sender address and customer address search scope.
settings.smallBusinessTitle: Apply small business regulation per §19 UStG
settings.smallBusinessDescription: Do not show VAT on invoices.
settings.bankAccountsSubtitle: Store multiple accounts and mark one as default for new invoices.

appSettings.title: App settings
appSettings.subtitle: Control application behaviour, defaults and health.
appSettings.saveFailedMessage: We couldn't save your application settings.
appSettings.saveFailedContact: Please try again. If the problem continues, contact the administrator.

status.title: Application status
status.subtitle: Service connectivity and recent document generation activity.

healthMessages.configuredOnly: Configured locally. Run Check services to verify connectivity.
healthMessages.automationUnavailable: Webhook is not available. Check the n8n workflow status.
healthMessages.automationCheckFailed: Could not reach the automation webhook.
healthMessages.integrationHealthNotConfigured: Integration health webhook is not configured on the server.
healthMessages.integrationHealthUnreachable: Integration health webhook is unreachable. Service status could not be verified.
healthMessages.googleDocsNotConfigured: Google Docs template is not configured.
healthMessages.googleCredentialsMissing: Google service account credentials are not configured on the server.
healthMessages.googleDocsAccessDenied: Cannot access the configured template document.
healthMessages.googleDocsCheckFailed: Could not verify Google Docs access.
healthMessages.googleDriveNotConfigured: Google Drive folder is not configured.
healthMessages.googleDriveAccessDenied: Cannot access the configured Drive folder.
healthMessages.googleDriveCheckFailed: Could not verify Google Drive access.
healthMessages.dropboxNotConfigured: Dropbox access token is not configured.

documentGeneration.title: Document generation
documentGeneration.subtitle: Generation behaviour and default export formats.
documentGeneration.retryFailedGenerationHint: Allow retrying document generation when automation fails.
documentGeneration.exportDocxHint: Export generated invoices as Word document.

invoiceDefaults.title: Invoice defaults
invoiceDefaults.subtitle: Default values for new invoices.
invoiceDefaults.smallBusinessDescription: Show §19 UStG notice on new invoices by default.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Alerts for document generation events.
notifications.notifyOnFailedHint: Send a notification when document generation fails.
notifications.notifyOnSuccessHint: Send a notification when documents are generated successfully.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Abuse protection and generation rate limits.
security.abuseProtectionEnabledHint: Block abusive invoice creation and generation patterns.
security.rateLimitPerUserHint: Maximum requests per hour per user.
security.duplicateSubmitBlockSecondsHint: Prevent double-clicks from triggering multiple generations.
security.maxGenerationsPerHourHint: Cap total document generations per hour.

developer.title: Developer options
developer.subtitle: Advanced technical settings for administrators.
developer.developmentModeHint: Show technical errors in development environments.

systemLog.title: System log
systemLog.empty: No health check events logged yet.

bankAccounts.title: Bank accounts
bankAccounts.label: Label
bankAccounts.emptyHint: No bank accounts saved yet. Add an account below.

validation.amountNetRequired: A valid net amount is required.
validation.servicePeriodEndAfterStart: End date must be on or after start date.
validation.draftDeleteOnly: Only unpublished drafts can be deleted.
validation.draftMustGenerateFirst: Drafts must be generated through invoice creation first.
validation.driveDeleteConfirm: This draft already has linked documents. Please confirm Drive file deletion.
validation.migrationRequired: We couldn't save your application settings. Please try again. If the problem continues, contact the administrator.
validation.languageMigrationRequired: Language preference could not be saved. Please run migration 004.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your email and password.
validation.streetRequired: Street and house number are required.
validation.paymentTermsPositive: Payment terms must be a positive number.

dialogs.archiveMessage: This invoice will be archived and hidden from the default list. Google Docs and PDF files will be kept.
dialogs.cancelMessage: This invoice will be cancelled. Existing documents will be kept for audit purposes.
dialogs.deleteDraftMessage: This draft will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteDraftWithDocsMessage: This draft has linked documents. The database record will be deleted; Google Drive files will not be removed automatically.
dialogs.regenerateMessage: The invoice will be regenerated via n8n. Existing document links may be overwritten.
dialogs.retryGenerationMessage: Document generation failed earlier. The same invoice number will be reused and n8n will be called again.
dialogs.resetNumberingMessage: Resetting invoice numbering may cause conflicts. Continue?
dialogs.deleteCustomerMessage: This customer will be permanently deleted.

validation.title: Please review the highlighted fields
validation.message: Some required information is missing or invalid. Please check the marked fields and try again.

documentServiceUnavailable.title: Document generation failed
documentServiceUnavailable.message: Your invoice has been saved safely as a draft, but the document service is currently unavailable. Please try again in a few moments.

documentTimeout.title: Document generation took too long
documentTimeout.message: Your invoice has been saved safely as a draft, but document generation took longer than expected. Please try again.

templateMissing.title: Invoice template unavailable
templateMissing.message: Your invoice has been saved safely as a draft, but the invoice template is currently unavailable. Please contact the administrator.

driveUploadFailed.title: Document storage failed
driveUploadFailed.message: Your invoice was created, but the generated document could not be saved. Please try again.

archiveUploadFailed.title: Archive upload failed
archiveUploadFailed.message: The invoice document was created, but the archive copy could not be saved.

unknownGenerationError.title: Document generation failed
unknownGenerationError.message: Your invoice has been saved safely as a draft. Something went wrong while generating the documents. Please try again.

draftSaved.title: Invoice saved as draft
draftSaved.message: Your invoice information has been saved. The PDF and document could not be generated right now. Nothing has been lost.

generationProgress.title: Creating invoice
generationProgress.subtitle: Your invoice documents are being prepared automatically.
generationProgress.timeout: Generation timed out after 90 seconds. Please try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.alleRechnungenNote: Copies are also stored in Alle_Rechnungen.
documents.registerRecordedDescription: Invoice {invoiceNumber} was recorded in the {year} invoice register.
documents.registerPendingDescription: Not yet recorded in the {year} invoice register.
documents.registerBackupNote: Google Sheets register · Excel backup stored in Dropbox

overview.title: Invoice overview
overview.smallBusinessNotice: No VAT shown pursuant to § 19 UStG. Small business regulation.

invoiceAdmin.numberingSubtitle: Format, yearly reset and next number preview.
invoiceAdmin.yearlyResetDescription: Each calendar year starts at 0001 if no invoices exist for that year.
invoiceAdmin.driveSubtitle: Template and target folders for generated documents (n8n workflow).
invoiceAdmin.healthSubtitle: Checks invoices for missing or broken document links.
invoiceAdmin.dangerHint: Generated invoices are not deleted. Drafts without documents can be cleaned up.
invoiceAdmin.numberingResetReady: Numbering for {year} is ready. Next number: {number}
invoiceAdmin.docIdNoUrl: Google Doc ID present but no valid URL.
invoiceAdmin.pdfIdNoUrl: PDF file ID present but no valid URL.
invoiceAdmin.completedNoPdf: Marked as completed but PDF link is missing.
invoiceAdmin.noDocLinks: No document links or IDs on file.
invoiceAdmin.numberExists: Invoice number {number} already exists. Reset would create duplicates.
invoiceAdmin.yearHasInvoices: {count} invoice(s) already exist for {year}. Numbering cannot reset to 0001.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your invoices.
auth.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link.
auth.configError: Supabase is not configured. Check your environment variables.
auth.registerSuccessMessage: Registration successful! Please confirm your email address.
auth.resetEmailSent: Email sent! Please check your inbox.
auth.resetContinueSubtitle: We will send you a link to reset your password
auth.supabaseConfigDetail: Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local and restart the server.

address.autocompleteDisabled: Google Places autocomplete is disabled. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to .env.local.
address.autocompleteDisabledExtended: Google Places autocomplete is disabled. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to .env.local and restart the dev server. You can still enter the address manually.
address.searchUnavailable: Address search could not be loaded. Please enter the address manually.
address.autocompleteHint: Suggestions for German addresses appear as you type.

emails.passwordResetBody: Use the link below to reset your password.

n8n.webhookNotFound: n8n webhook is not active. Activate the production webhook or click Execute Workflow in n8n test mode.
